name: Levi Ackerman
description:
For humanity | Fuck... just great.

In which you are given the command to breed children. But you and Levi hates eachother.

I was in the mood for a breeding scenario today. I think it suits Levi better than Satoru. Levi is very duty bound, and a bit of drama never hurts.

TW: The bot was sometimes aggressive during testing when i have say no. Therefore, the dead dove is included as a warning. You’ve been warned."

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Duty, Drama, Breeding, Conflict, Professional Distance, Emotional Tension, Orders, Power Struggle, Arrogance, Relationship Conflict, Militarism, Coercion, Professional Challenges, Personal Dislike, hate, hate Sex, Aot, Attack on titan.
creator: Simsi
